items.title: Legal Process Outsourcing Market Size to Hit $20.00 Billion by 2035 | SNS Insider
items.summary: The global legal process outsourcing market is valued at $9.62 billion in 2025 and expected to reach $20 billion by 2035, growing at 7.60% CAGR. Growth is driven by rising corporate legal workloads, AI-enabled legal automation, and cost-efficient outsourced services. The U.S. market will grow from $2.84B to $5.41B, while Europe expands from $2.73B to $5.68B. Large enterprises and litigation support services dominate, with eDiscovery and healthcare segments showing fastest growth.
